{{Quote|Baron Wazado. STATUS: Terminated.|The log of ASN-121|<ref name="Droids" />}}
'''Wazado''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Baron/Legends|baron]]. Prior to the [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|plot]] to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]<ref name="Droids" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Wazado was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[ASN-121/Legends|ASN-121]], a custom [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] owned by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]. Wesell's next target was Amidala, and during that assassination attempt, she shot ASN-121 down on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Fragments of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] were found<ref name="Droids" /> in an alleyway<ref name="Encyclopedia">{{CSWECite|II|176|Jubben, Senator}}</ref> in the world's [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|undercity]], and when [[Slicer/Legends|sliced]], ASN-121's logs revealed Wesell's involvement in Wazado's death.<ref name="Droids" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wazado was mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'', a [[2006]] reference book by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="Droids" />
